overview: QuickGig is a premium AI-powered gig marketplace that instantly connects students, freelancers, and part-time workers with local businesses needing urgent temporary help — from 1-hour shifts to full-day gigs.
features: Premium landing page with glassmorphic design and smooth animations
Dual signup for Workers and Employers with role-based dashboards
Worker profiles with skills, hourly rate, availability, and ratings
Employer profiles with logo, business info, and job management
Job posting with urgent flag, location, pay, duration, and skill requirements
Job discovery with search, filters, distance, and urgent badges
Job application workflow with accept/reject and status tracking
Ratings and reviews after job completion
Stripe payment integration for job completion
